metadata.notes: Static GitHub Pages data layer. Use as DivGaming source of truth for reference pages; validate/expand over time.

items.name: Boomerang / Perfect Boomerang
items.description: Weapon · Critical hits can return the bullet and amplify the next shot. Perfect version appears on The Virginian.

items.name: Determined / Perfect Determined
items.description: Weapon · After a headshot kill, the next shot can count as a headshot. Perfect version appears on named precision weapons.

items.name: Fast Hands / Perfect Fast Hands
items.description: Weapon · Critical hits build reload-speed stacks. Perfect version appears on Good Times.

items.name: Flatline / Perfect Flatline
items.description: Weapon · Amplifies weapon damage to pulsed enemies. Perfect version appears on Kingbreaker.

items.name: Ignited / Perfect Ignited
items.description: Weapon · Increases damage to burning enemies. Perfect version appears on Pyromaniac.

items.name: In Sync / Perfect In Sync
items.description: Weapon · Weapon hits increase skill damage; skill hits increase weapon damage. Perfect versions appear on Harmony/Test Subject.

items.name: Killer / Perfect Killer
items.description: Weapon · Killing with a critical hit grants critical hit damage. Perfect version appears on Dark Winter.

items.name: Lucky Shot / Perfect Lucky Shot
items.description: Weapon · Increases magazine size and returns missed shots from cover. Perfect version appears on Baker’s Dozen.

items.name: Measured / Perfectly Measured
items.description: Weapon · Top and bottom halves of the magazine trade rate of fire and damage. Perfect version appears on The Apartment.

items.name: Optimist
items.description: Weapon · Weapon damage increases as the magazine empties.

items.name: Perpetuation / Perfect Perpetuation
items.description: Weapon · Headshots increase the next status-effect damage/duration. Perfect version appears on Golan-associated named weapon examples.

items.name: Ranger
items.description: Weapon · Amplifies weapon damage based on distance from target.

items.name: Rifleman / Perfect Rifleman
items.description: Weapon · Landing headshots stacks weapon damage. Perfect version appears on Artist’s Tool.

items.name: Sadist / Perfect Sadist
items.description: Weapon · Increases damage to bleeding enemies. Perfect version appears on Carnage.

items.name: Sledgehammer / Perfect Sledgehammer
items.description: Weapon · Grenade damage marks enemies so they take increased armor damage. Perfect version appears on Lefty.

items.name: Spike / Perfect Spike
items.description: Weapon · Headshots increase skill damage. Perfect version appears on Surge.
